children.name: slide-subtitle
children.text: Express routes separate public tracking from private staff operations, then use JWT middleware to protect repair data.
4. Frontend sends Bearer token on private repair requests
The protect middleware verifies the token, loads the user, and rejects missing or invalid credentials with 401 responses.
